economic_ownership_map.label: Form 990 net assets (accounting floor)

low.label: Provisional economic units outstanding (OTC aggregator; unverified)
low.rationale: Low case uses fewer assets per share via higher share count; high case uses lower share count. Base matches aggregator ~3.46M pending Form 990 governance disclosure.

base.label: Provisional economic units outstanding (OTC aggregator; unverified)
base.rationale: Low case uses fewer assets per share via higher share count; high case uses lower share count. Base matches aggregator ~3.46M pending Form 990 governance disclosure.

high.label: Provisional economic units outstanding (OTC aggregator; unverified)
high.rationale: Low case uses fewer assets per share via higher share count; high case uses lower share count. Base matches aggregator ~3.46M pending Form 990 governance disclosure.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Form 990 FY2024 extract (EIN 11-1190044); proof base 46.7929/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (PLWN/research/evidence/form990_fy2024_extract.json). Share count remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: 990 net assets as reference floor for the nonprofit entity, not proven liquidation NAV.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Accounting reference only until PDF and share count verified.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Verified share count or Schedule D shows net assets per economic unit far from this band.

low.label: Seven-year cemetery owner-cash capitalization multiple

economic_ownership_map.label: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts

low.label: Provisional economic units outstanding (OTC aggregator; unverified)

source.locator: notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math

low.label: Risk-adjusted land fair-value uplift above 990 carrying amounts
low.rationale: Long Island cemetery land may carry below market on Form 990 Schedule D; base assigns modest risked uplift; high case is appraisal upside pending local PDF.

low.label: Probability land mark-up is economically accessible to minority OTC holders
low.rationale: Low case zeroes option until Schedule D / appraisal evidence; base/high apply full modeled uplift.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Form 990 FY2024 extract (EIN 11-1190044); proof base 15.0/sh via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0 (PLWN/research/evidence/form990_fy2024_extract.json). Share count remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Option on land mark-up; not double-counted inside form990_net_assets.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization only via control transaction or gradual plot sales; not a dated payoff.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assigns modest probability of a material mark-up; high case is appraisal upside.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No owner-funded development capital modeled; cemetery ops fund maintenance.

economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Schedule D / appraisal shows no material gap above 990 carrying value.

economic_ownership_map.label: OTC illiquidity and nonprofit-governance reserve

low.label: Provisional economic units outstanding (OTC aggregator; unverified)

source.locator: notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math

low.label: OTC illiquidity, 501(c)(13) governance, and share-count conflict reserve
low.rationale: Thin OTC Pink market, nonprofit distribution constraints, and unresolved share count that makes a $45.40 indicated dividend implausible versus $5.3M FY2024 net income.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Option on land mark-up; not double-counted inside form990_net_assets.

top_value_drivers.label: OTC illiquidity and nonprofit-governance reserve
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Large reserve until share count and dividend cash facts are verified.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: 990 net assets as reference floor for the nonprofit entity, not proven liquidation NAV.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Modest capitalization of cemetery cash earnings; land value is separate.

source_lineage.locator: notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math
notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math
notes: aggregator ~3.46M shares provisional; conflicts with dividend cash math

falsifiers: Verified share count or Schedule D shows net assets per economic unit far from this band.
Operations cannot sustain distributions anywhere near the indicated $45.40 dividend under the provisional share count.
Schedule D / appraisal shows no material gap above 990 carrying value.
Verified float and governance show minority common can realize NAV without the haircut.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
